mapper.sql: id, company_id, bill_no, bill_date, supplier_id, supplier_name, settle_type, warehouse_id, warehouse_name, user_name, currency, remark, status, create_user_id, create_by_name, audit_user_id, audit_user_name, audit_time, submit_time, ship_time, complete_time, total_qty, net_amount, tax_amount, total_amount, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note
id, order_id, sort, item_code, item_name, spec, unit, qty, price_excl, tax_rate, tax_amount, total_amount, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note
id, order_id, sort, source_bill_no, source_type, supplier_name, bill_date, total_amount, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note
id, order_id, sort, file_name, file_type, file_size, upload_user, upload_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note
id, order_id, action_code, action_name, content, operator_user_id, operator_name, activity_type, operate_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note
mapper.select: select count(1) as total_count, sum(case when status = 'unaudited' then 1 else 0 end) as unaudited_count, sum(case when status = 'pre_audited' then 1 else 0 end) as pre_audited_count, sum(case when status = 'completed' then 1 else 0 end) as completed_count, coalesce(sum(total_amount), 0) as total_amount from purchase_order where company_id = #{companyId}
mapper.insert: insert into purchase_order ( id, company_id, bill_no, bill_date, supplier_id, supplier_name, settle_type, warehouse_id, warehouse_name, user_name, currency, remark, status, create_user_id, create_by_name, audit_user_id, audit_user_name, audit_time, submit_time, ship_time, complete_time, total_qty, net_amount, tax_amount, total_amount, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note ) values ( #{id}, #{companyId}, #{billNo}, #{billDate}, #{supplierId}, #{supplierName}, #{settleType}, #{warehouseId}, #{warehouseName}, #{userName}, #{currency}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{createUserId}, #{createByName}, #{auditUserId}, #{auditUserName}, #{auditTime}, #{submitTime}, #{shipTime}, #{completeTime}, #{totalQty}, #{netAmount}, #{taxAmount}, #{totalAmount}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{note} )
mapper.select: select from purchase_order_item where order_id = #{orderId} order by sort asc, id asc
select from purchase_order_source where order_id = #{orderId} order by sort asc, id asc
select from purchase_order_attachment where order_id = #{orderId} order by sort asc, id asc
select from purchase_order_activity where order_id = #{orderId} order by operate_time desc, id desc
